sentences.arabic: كَانَ حَامِدٌ يُحِبُّ أَنْ يُصَوِّرَ الطَّبِيعَةَ بِهَاتِفِهِ.
sentences.translation: Hamid je volio fotografisati prirodu telefonom.
sentences.translationEn: Hamid liked to photograph nature with his phone.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ وَصَوَّرَ الزُّهُورَ وَالطُّيُورَ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u park i fotografisao cvijeće i ptice.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the park and photographed flowers and birds.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعَ الصُّوَرَ فِي أَلْبُومٍ خَاصٍّ فِي هَاتِفِهِ.
sentences.translation: Prikupio je fotografije u poseban album u telefonu.
sentences.translationEn: He collected the photos in a special album in his phone.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ سَعِيدًا حِينَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهَا فِي الْمَسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je sretan kad bi ih gledao uveče.
sentences.translationEn: He was happy when he looked at them in the evening.
